ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a modern masterpiece and a film that leaves a lasting, terrifying impact. It is consistently cited as a benchmark for effective, non-cheap horror.

ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Topped a user poll for 'favorite singular horror movie.' Universally praised as a classic for its practical effects, atmosphere, and rewatchability.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a favorite for its slow-burn dread, iconic imagery, and infinite rewatchability. It was also featured in user-created art, highlighting its lasting cultural impact.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a top choice for a singular favorite horror film, celebrated for its perfect blend of sci-fi and horror.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: The 2002 American remake was the subject of a dedicated post arguing it is one of the greatest horror movies ever made. Praised for its dreary atmosphere, sense of doom, and impactful story.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Multiple users expressed that it will become a classic. Described as an incredible and rewatchable film that creates a unique sense of pervasive dread.

ranked_movies.title: The Witch
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended as a recent film destined to be a classic. Appreciated for its authenticity, atmosphere, and historical horror.

ranked_movies.title: Poltergeist
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a favorite classic film, specifically for its ability to tap into childhood fears. The character Reverend Kane from Poltergeist 2 was also widely discussed for being terrifying.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a favorite horror movie that ignited a love for the genre for many fans. Also mentioned as a fun, rewatchable 'bad' movie in the context of its sequels.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Named as a favorite for its enduring power to scare audiences decades after its release, solidifying its status as a timeless classic.

ranked_movies.title: Smile 2
ranked_movies.reason: A user's personal pick for a future classic, described as an extremely effective horror movie that induced a '2-hour psychological panic attack' in theaters.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a favorite film, with notable discussion about its lost footage and its cult status among fans.

ranked_movies.title: Terrifier
ranked_movies.reason: Acknowledged as a film that has cemented itself in the horror genre and will inspire Halloween costumes for years to come, despite mixed opinions on its quality.

ranked_movies.title: The Substance
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a recent horror movie that is special and likely to become a classic.

ranked_movies.title: Halloween
ranked_movies.reason: Named as a foundational favorite that started one user's love for horror, highlighting its significant impact on the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Mandy
ranked_movies.reason: A personal pick for a modern classic from a user, praised for its surprising and intense style, particularly from Nicolas Cage.

ranked_movies.title: House on Haunted Hill
ranked_movies.reason: The 1999 remake was mentioned as a favorite 'objectively bad' movie that is fun and rewatchable, representing a specific era of horror.

ranked_movies.title: Thirteen Ghosts
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently paired with House on Haunted Hill as a beloved, fun, and cheesy horror movie from the early 2000s with memorable visuals.

ranked_movies.title: The First Omen
ranked_movies.reason: Praised as a recent surprise hit with outstanding visuals and creativity, making it a potential new classic for many viewers.

ranked_movies.title: Eden Lake
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as one of the most disturbing and impactful films that left a user feeling physically sick and angry, highlighting its effectiveness.
